tool_name: Electrical Motor Energy Audit — Load Factor, Efficiency Penalty & VFD Retrofit ROI

inputs.name: Measured Input Power at Operating Point
Annual Operating Hours
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 2768-1:1989 — Discrete count variable, zero measurement uncertainty

inputs.name: Electricity Tariff
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7 — Market parameter Type B: cost/price estimates ±5%

inputs.name: Average Operating Load Factor (% of rated output)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 376:2011 §5 — Class 1 force transducer: ±1% of applied force

inputs.name: VFD Capital Cost (installed)
inputs.uncertainty_source: ISO 21748:2017 §7 — Market parameter Type B: cost/price estimates ±5%

inputs.name: Expected Energy Saving with VFD
inputs.note: Fan/pump affinity laws: saving ≈ 1-(load_ratio)³; typical 20–40% for centrifugal loads

formulas: LF = avg_load_pct / 100   // [dimensionless] Load Factor Reference: IEC 60034-30-1 §4 — load factor definition

eta_partload = nameplate_efficiency_pct * LF / (LF^2 * (1 - nameplate_efficiency_pct/100) * 2 + LF * nameplate_efficiency_pct/100 + (1-LF)^2 * 0.05 * (1-nameplate_efficiency_pct/100))   // [%] Part-Load Efficiency (Eff@LF) Reference: NEMA MG1-2016 Part 30 — semi-empirical part-load efficiency model
E_current_kwh_yr = measured_input_kw * operating_hours_yr   // [kWh/yr] Annual Energy Consumption — Current
E_vfd_kwh_yr = E_current_kwh_yr * (1 - vfd_energy_saving_pct/100)   // [kWh/yr] Annual Energy Consumption — With VFD
saving_usd_yr = (E_current_kwh_yr - E_vfd_kwh_yr) * electricity_rate_usd_kwh   // [USD/yr] Annual Energy Cost Saving Reference: ISO 50001:2018 §6.3 — energy baseline and saving verification
payback_yr = vfd_cost_usd / saving_usd_yr   // [years] VFD Simple Payback Period

V1.error_msg: Measured input exceeds 115% of rated power: motor overloaded or power measurement error

V2.error_msg: Load factor <40%: motor significantly oversized — downsizing or VFD mandatory for IE3 compliance

V3.error_msg: Negative saving: check VFD saving input or operating hours

smart_warnings.message: Load factor < 50%: motor running in low-efficiency zone — IE3 motors below 50% load see 5–15% efficiency drop per IEC 60034-30-1
VFD payback > 5 years: marginal ROI — re-evaluate saving estimate or negotiate capital cost
VFD payback < 2 years: strong ROI — prioritize for next capital cycle
Motor below IE2 threshold for this power class: EU Regulation 640/2009 compliance risk — IE3 minimum required >7.5 kW
High-utilisation + high saving: evaluate premium IE4/IE5 motor replacement in parallel with VFD

fmea.effect: Measured input exceeds 115% of rated power: motor overloaded or power measurement error
fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

fmea.effect: Load factor <40%: motor significantly oversized — downsizing or VFD mandatory for IE3 compliance

fmea.control_measure: Input validation — automatic BLOCK on violation

VFD payback > 5 years: marginal ROI — re-evaluate saving estimate or negotiate capital cost
VFD payback < 2 years: strong ROI — prioritize for next capital cycle

fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: nameplate_efficiency_pct < 90 && rated_power_kw > 15

fmea.failureMode: High-utilisation + high saving: evaluate premium IE4/IE5 motor replacement in parallel with VFD
fmea.effect: Smart warning triggered when: operating_hours_yr > 6000 && vfd_energy_saving_pct > 25
